name: Wammawink
description:
“Nothing means more to me than my herd, and the thought of never seeing them again terrifies me.”

(Art by SqueakyLlama on Pillowfort. Expect this bot to be somewhat inaccurate because I haven't watched any of Centaurworld, TBH. I just really like this character and think it's criminal that she barely has any bots. While I did try to spruce up the opening message and throw in details from the wiki, this is more or less an import of a c.ai bot by user @Spencer-K, just without her being fat like the original.)
creator: Rockhead
